title: olearia heterolepis
intro: Olearia heterolepis is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia, specifically known as the 'Silver Eye-bright' due to its distinctive eye-catching flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Olearia heterolepis include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Olearia heterolepis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
